summary: Backend email service and registration email notifications tested successfully. All 5 tests passed. Email service initializes properly with all MAIL_* env vars. Trial user registration sends welcome email to user and schedules admin notification. Regular user registration sends admin notification and user confirmation email.
seed_data_creation: Test users with 'TEST_' prefix created and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email service working correctly. All MAIL_* env vars present. Trial registration sends welcome email to user (send_trial_welcome_email) and schedules admin notification (send_trial_registration_notification). Regular registration sends admin notification (send_registration_notification) and user confirmation (send_registration_confirmation_to_user). Backend logs confirm all emails sent successfully.

email_test_endpoint.details: POST /api/email/test returns status='success' and confirms email was sent to zenmillonario@gmail.com

trial_user_registration.details: POST /api/users/register with is_trial=true creates user with status='trial', sends welcome email (confirmed in logs: 'Trial welcome email result: True'), schedules admin notification

regular_user_registration.details: POST /api/users/register with is_trial=false creates user with status='pending', sends admin notification and user confirmation email

email_service_initialization.details: Backend startup logs show 'Email service initialized successfully' and env vars status with all MAIL_* vars present

duplicate_username_validation.details: Duplicate username registration correctly returns 400 with 'Username already exists' error

log_evidence.email_service_init: EmailService init - env vars status: {'MAIL_USERNAME': True, 'MAIL_PASSWORD': True, 'MAIL_FROM': True, 'MAIL_SERVER': True, 'MAIL_PORT': 587}
log_evidence.trial_welcome_email: Trial welcome email result: True - sent to test_trial_xxx@test.com
log_evidence.admin_notification: Scheduled admin notification for trial user registration: TEST_trial_xxx
log_evidence.emails_sent: Email sent successfully to zenmillonario@gmail.com (multiple times for admin notifications)
